summary:
MASSIVE NEW MADRID EARTHQUAKE: In a profound dream, Brandon witnessed a catastrophic earthquake striking the United States along the New Madrid fault line. This seismic event was described by Brandon as the largest earthquake to ever occur on Earth. The immense tremors physically split and widened the Mississippi River, creating total devastation across a massive geographical area. Brandon observed widespread fires and extreme destruction stretching all the way from the New Orleans region straight up into the Chicago area. 

INFRASTRUCTURE COLLAPSE AND EMERGENCY LOGISTICS: The sheer force of the main earthquake caused every single bridge along the Mississippi River to collapse, completely severing the primary east-to-west transportation routes for semi-trucks. To mitigate this critical logistical failure, the military intervened. The Army deployed temporary floating bridges up and down the affected highway points to allow limited emergency access. However, because standard trucking logistics remained severely hindered across the country, the government was forced to rely heavily on aviation. Enormous cargo planes were utilized to air-drop and transport essential food supplies to isolated cities across the nation that supply trucks could no longer reach.

MILITARY MOBILIZATION AND ATMOSPHERIC CONDITIONS: In another visionary experience, Brandon stood on his back porch in the central part of the United States and observed a massive military mobilization. Formations of 30 to 40 massive Chinook helicopters flew low overhead, traveling from the West Coast toward the East Coast. The sheer volume and low altitude of the aircraft generated deafening noise that physically shook local houses. Accompanying this intense aerial movement was a potent, inescapable smell of fire in the air, creating a visible haze identical to a massive grass fire. Brandon inherently understood that a monumental, 9/11-level event had just occurred, fundamentally shaking the nation. The surrounding neighborhood was eerily quiet, as all residents were confined indoors, glued to their television screens to monitor the unfolding crisis.

DESOLATION OF NEW YORK AND ECONOMIC HALT: During the dream, Brandon was shown a distinct image of a stone lion's face. Prompted by a divine voice to observe the New York Stock Exchange, Brandon later verified in waking life that the actual NYSE building features these exact stone lions along its roofline. In the vision, the streets of New York City were entirely abandoned and completely desolate. Brandon noted the surreal sight of tumbleweeds rolling down the empty urban avenues. The atmosphere mirrored the severe lockdowns of the COVID-19 pandemic, with the government and economy entirely shut down, and the civilian population completely hidden away from the streets.

DESTRUCTIVE AFTERSHOCKS AND CASUALTIES: As the fleets of helicopters continued toward the Mississippi Valley, Brandon witnessed a secondary earthquake, acting as a massive aftershock, striking the region between Texarkana and Tulsa, Oklahoma. While the primary New Madrid quake registered as a catastrophic magnitude 10.0, this subsequent tremor was estimated to be a magnitude 6.0 or higher. The seismic activity completely leveled and flattened homes, particularly destroying houses that were built on cinder blocks rather than solid concrete slabs. Brandon learned that 1,800 people perished in this specific wave of destruction. Although Brandon remains uncertain of the exact timeline regarding when these disasters will unfold—noting it could happen in the fall, spring, or years from now—he carries a heavy conviction that these impending events require intense prayer and spiritual readiness.
rawData: [June 29, 2023]-[The Lord gave me a dream about a massive 10.0 earthquake splitting the USA in half on the New Madrid]-[https://youtu.be/9LbOC7UXbc0]-[In this dream, the Lord showed me a massive earthquake that was going to happen in America. It was the New Madrid fault, and this was literally the largest earthquake that had ever happened on the Earth. Whenever I saw it in my dream, it happened right by the Mississippi River, and it split the Mississippi River and made it bigger. All the bridges that were on the Mississippi River collapsed, and they were all down. The Lord showed me things were on fire; it was total devastation. I could see it went clear down to the New Orleans area and clear up into the Chicago area. It was massive. As I said, all the bridges fell, so there was no way for semi-trucks to go from east to west. They brought in these bridges from the Army; they were like floating bridges. The Army brought them in and put them in all up and down where the highways were, trying to make it so trucks could come in and out for emergencies. But they couldn't get the trucks from east to west, so they brought in planes. They flew the food into cities where the semi-trucks couldn't get back and forth, bringing the food in humongous cargo planes so that the food could get throughout all the cities in America. In another dream, the Lord showed me massive helicopters, Chinook helicopters, and they were flying from the west. I stood on the back porch in my dream and I could visibly smell fire in the air. It was so strong; it was like the haze you see from a fire whenever there is a grass fire. I could hear the helicopters flying low, and they were all coming in lines, in formation. The helicopters were coming from the West Coast and going to the East Coast. Where I live is in the central part of America, so you could hear them coming. They were so loud because there were so many of them at a time, all flying in formation. There were probably 30 or 40 of them at a time, and it would shake the houses. I didn't watch TV in the dream, but I knew that it was just like a 9/11 event; it was that big, something that shook America. Everything was quiet. I could look across at my neighbors, but nobody was outside; they were all inside watching what happened on TV. Then the Lord took my eyes in the dream to a stone lion's face. I was asking, 'What is that?' because I saw the stone lion face. All of a sudden in the dream, He said, 'Look at the Stock Exchange, the New York Stock Exchange.' I didn't know where this lion face was, so I woke up the next day and looked up the Stock Exchange. On the top of the building, there are lions all along the top, and it was the exact lion. In the dream, I could see the streets of New York, and they were completely desolate. I could see tumbleweeds, which was weird because I know there are no tumbleweeds in New York, but I saw them going down the street. It was desolate; there was nobody moving around. It was completely blank, like the people had all gone and were hiding out, because the whole government and everything was shut down again, kind of like COVID was. It was really weird. For a long time, those helicopters were going towards the Mississippi area. Then the Lord showed me another earthquake; it was like an aftershock that happened by the Texarkana area and went clear up to Tulsa, Oklahoma. I could see that it was probably a magnitude 6 or bigger. But the one that hit the Mississippi Valley area was like a 10.0. I could see that all the houses built on cinder blocks—houses not on a flat slab—were completely destroyed. In this, 1,800 people died. The Lord was showing me the people who had perished in the dream where all of the houses were completely leveled and flattened from this massive earthquake. I don't know why it happens or when it happens; all I know is that I saw this and have prayed over it. I feel that it's about to happen soon. Like I said, it could happen in the fall, it could happen in the spring, or it could be years from now. I just see these things; the Lord gives them to me, and I pray over them. It was just something heavy on my heart to share. If you have seen this or heard of anyone who has, you can comment in the comment section. I appreciate you following me. I have more things that I want to share, but I want to do it on separate videos for what I feel the Lord has shown me is coming. I really appreciate it. Thank you all very much. Bye-bye.]
